title: Mentor Guide — Day 8 — Professional Readiness
coachingObjective: Support squads through AIA Pre-Contract Training and professional readiness reflection — never frame as licensing.

timing.preSession: Confirm squad Professional Readiness status in mentor dashboard
timing.duringSession: Monitor course progress; offer mentor verification where needed

discussionQuestions: How does professional readiness connect to the discovery work from Monday and Tuesday?
What stood out from the Pre-Contract course?
Is the squad on track for Thursday FEC Validation Lab?
coachingTips: Use Professional Readiness language — not licensing
Verify completion for squad members who cannot upload evidence
Connect privilege → responsibility → preparation in debrief
warningSigns: Participants skipping reflection after course completion
Squad members falling behind before Thursday
reflectionPrompts: What did you learn that will make you a better financial professional?

activityCoachingNotes.notes: ~4 hour AIA Pre-Contract Training — complete before Friday.

debriefWithFaculty: Squads not yet started on readiness course
